subcodes.first_line: O ye sincere friends of the Lord of Hosts! The Ancient Beauty, the Most Great Name—may my spirit be sacrificed for His loved ones—by all His names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان خالص حضرت یزدان جمال قدم و اسم اعظم روحی لاحبائه الفدا بجمیع اسماء
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
